description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden cabinet with a deep reddish-brown finish, reminiscent of traditional Asian or antique furniture. The front features a single door with a prominent gold-colored handle or latch, adding a decorative and functional accent. The top of the cabinet is slightly overhanging with upward-curved edges, giving it a pagoda-like silhouette. The sides and back are plain, with the same rich wood tone and no visible openings or embellishments. The cabinet stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage of small items in an urban or residential setting.
description: A small, reddish-brown wooden cabinet with a gold handle and pagoda-style top, standing on four short legs. The front door is the main interactive feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single door with a gold handle and the overhanging, curved top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth, plain side panel, and short legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned back with the same wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with no additional features.
